questions: You're in a flat, neutral mood today. Your best friend surprises you with a visit after not seeing each other for two years. How do you react?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. You come home to find your partner has cooked your favorite meal and set the table with candles. What do you feel?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. You get a call telling you that you've been accepted into a program you applied to months ago. How do you respond?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. Your child takes their first steps while you're watching and reaches out to you with a huge smile. What goes through you?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. You're at a wedding and the couple reads their own vows, and the bride starts laughing through tears. How does the moment hit you?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. You finish a creative project you've been working on for months and step back to look at the result. How do you feel?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. A song comes on the radio that was playing during one of the happiest moments of your life. What happens inside you?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. You're watching the sunset from your backyard with someone you love sitting quietly next to you. What's your state of mind?
You're in a flat, neutral mood today. You get a handwritten letter from an old friend thanking you for something kind you did years ago. How does it make you feel?

You're in a flat, neutral mood today. You wake up on a Saturday morning with nothing to do, sun streaming through the window, and realize everything in your life is going well right now. What do you feel?
